about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: Hey! I'm Matilda, based in Stockholm and working as a Junior Android Developer at BookBeat. My coding journey didn't start with complex algorithms at age 12. My first memory of code was in middleschool using 'Inspect Code' to mess with news websites and trick my classmates. I graduated in May with my degree in Java development, and immediately jumped into Android—something I'd never done before. Honestly? I've instantly fallen in love with it.
about.paragraph2: What hooked me on IT was the realization that you're never truly 'done' learning—and that's been proven right again. I graduated thinking backend and DevOps was my calling, but then I discovered Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. There's something genuinely magical about building beautiful, functional mobile apps that people actually use on their phones. The mix of creative UI work and solid logic is just incredible. I'm constantly amazed by how fun and engaging mobile development is, and I'm excited to keep learning and growing in this space.
about.paragraph3: I try to approach both life and code with curiosity, humor, and the mindset that every “oops” is just a disguised learning moment. I'm always up for a new challenge, especially if it involves tech, teamwork, or a really good Spotify playlist.
about.paragraph4: Furthermore, when I'm not glued to my computer, you'll find me lifting weights or out on a long walk - then getting too tired and catching the bus back. I love a good board game night with family or friends (even though I lose about nine out of ten times - hey, at least I'm lucky in love). Otherwise, I'm probably scrubbing the oven, reorganizing the kitchen cabinet, which I find oddly therapeutic. When I need a break you'll find me rewatching Friends for the 11th time - always with a stash of lollies, of course.

projects.title: Projects
projects.note: Most of these projects are still under construction and cannot yet be viewed. Feel free to check out my GitHub repositories for more details about each project.

buzz.title: Buzz
buzz.description: Buzz...with your friends on this social media website.
buzz.feature1: Create, like, save, repost & comment on posts
buzz.feature2: Real time message and video/voice calls
buzz.feature3: Update user profile, follow & unfollow users

recipedia.title: Recipedia
recipedia.description: Get recipe suggestions based on what's already in your kitchen.
recipedia.feature2: Recipe suggestions with ratings and comments

bookmap.title: BookMap
bookmap.description: Find books at physical locations around Stockholm with interactive mapping.
bookmap.feature1: Browse books and view their physical locations on an interactive map
bookmap.feature2: Save favorite locations and explore new bookstores
bookmap.feature3: Native Android app built as a thesis project

fluxo.title: Fluxo
fluxo.description: Stay focused and organized - manage your tasks with Fluxo
fluxo.feature3: Full-stack Android app with Spring Boot REST API

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.paragraph: If you want to know more about me, or just like to say hello, send me a message or contact me through my socials. I'd love to hear from you.
contact.formText: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
